description: KedifyConfiguration is the Schema for the KedifyConfiguration API

apiVersion.description:
APIVersion defines the versioned schema of this representation of an object.
Servers should convert recognized schemas to the latest internal value, and
may reject unrecognized values.
More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#resources

kind.description:
Kind is a string value representing the REST resource this object represents.
Servers may infer this from the endpoint the client submits requests to.
Cannot be updated.
In CamelCase.
More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#types-kinds

spec.description: KedifyConfigurationSpec defines the desired state of KedifyConfiguration

cloudAccountID.description:
CloudAccountID is the optional ID of the cloud account of the user,
find your cloud account IDs in the Kedify Dashboard https://dashboard.kedify.io/organization-details

clusterName.description: ClusterName is the name of this k8s cluster in the Kedify Dashboard

kedaInstallations.description: KEDAInstallations defines the KEDA installations options

items.description: KEDAInstallation defines the desired state of a KEDA installation

agentAutoUpdate.description: AutoUpdate controls whether the agent should be auto updated to latest released version

httpAddonHelm.description: HTTPAddonHelm defines the http-addon Helm values and chart version for HTTP Addon installation

appVersion.description: AppVersion defines the actual version of the application that will be installed (KEDA or HttpAddon, this should correspond with the container image tags)

autoUpdate.description: AutoUpdate controls what strategy should be used for updating the AppVersion when new releases are available

chartVersion.description: ChartVersion defines the Helm chart version

enabled.description: Enabled determines whether the helm chart should be installed or not (for KEDA helm chart ManagementMode needs to also allow this)

kedaHelm.description: KedaHelm defines the Helm values and chart version for KEDA installation

appVersion.description: AppVersion defines the actual version of the application that will be installed (KEDA or HttpAddon, this should correspond with the container image tags)

autoUpdate.description: AutoUpdate controls what strategy should be used for updating the AppVersion when new releases are available

chartVersion.description: ChartVersion defines the Helm chart version

enabled.description: Enabled determines whether the helm chart should be installed or not (for KEDA helm chart ManagementMode needs to also allow this)

mode.description:
Mode defines how Agent should manage the KEDA installation
Managed: Agent will manage KEDA throughout its lifecycle
InstallOnly: Agent will install KEDA but not manage it
Adopt: Agent will adopt an existing KEDA installation

namespace.description: Namespace where KEDA should be installed

otelAddonHelm.description: OTELAddonHelm defines the otel-addon Helm values and chart version for OTEL Addon installation

appVersion.description: AppVersion defines the actual version of the application that will be installed (KEDA or HttpAddon, this should correspond with the container image tags)

autoUpdate.description: AutoUpdate controls what strategy should be used for updating the AppVersion when new releases are available

chartVersion.description: ChartVersion defines the Helm chart version

enabled.description: Enabled determines whether the helm chart should be installed or not (for KEDA helm chart ManagementMode needs to also allow this)

predictorAddonHelm.description: PredictorAddonHelm defines the predictor-addon Helm values and chart version for Predictor Addon installation

appVersion.description: AppVersion defines the actual version of the application that will be installed (KEDA or HttpAddon, this should correspond with the container image tags)

autoUpdate.description: AutoUpdate controls what strategy should be used for updating the AppVersion when new releases are available

chartVersion.description: ChartVersion defines the Helm chart version

enabled.description: Enabled determines whether the helm chart should be installed or not (for KEDA helm chart ManagementMode needs to also allow this)

controlPlane.description: ControlPlane defines the telemetry configuration for the control plane

disabled.description: Disabled defines if telemetry should be disabled, enabled by default

interval.description: Interval defines the interval for telemetry in seconds, 30 by default

kedaResources.description: KedaResources defines the telemetry configuration for the KEDA resources

disabled.description: Disabled defines if telemetry should be disabled, enabled by default

interval.description: Interval defines the interval for telemetry in seconds, 30 by default

kubernetesResources.description: KubernetesResources defines the telemetry configuration for the Kubernetes resources

disabled.description: Disabled defines if telemetry should be disabled, enabled by default

interval.description: Interval defines the interval for telemetry in seconds, 30 by default

status.description: KedifyConfigurationStatus defines the observed state of KedifyConfiguration

agent.description: Agent contains agent related status information

apiService.description: APIService captures the observed status of API Service registration called v1beta1.external.metrics.k8s.io

additionalProperties.description: KedifyComponentInstallationStatus defines the observed state of a KedifyInstallation
KedifyConfigurationResourceStatus defines the observed state of a KedifyConfiguration owned resources

components.description: Components captures the observed status of Kedify components (Keda, Http Addon and Otel Addon)

configSHA256.description: ConfigSHA256 calculated sha over all relevant field used for internal purposes

multiClusterStatus.description: MultiClusterStatus contains status information about multi-cluster deployments

additionalProperties.description: ClusterStatus defines the observed state of a cluster

hardTaintScopes.description:
HardTaintScopes lists hard-taint scopes for DSJs using priorityFailover.
Multiple entries may exist for a single cluster (for different classes/priorities).

items.description: ClusterHardTaintScope identifies one priorityFailover hard-taint scope.

class.description:
Class is the workload affinity class for which the cluster is tainted.
This can be empty to represent the default affinity class.

priority.description: Priority is the member-cluster scheduling priority for which the cluster is tainted.

hardTainted.description: HardTainted indicates the cluster is hard tainted for at least one DSJ scheduling path.

id.description: ID is the unique identifier of the cluster

info.description: Info contains additional information about the cluster status

state.description: State is the current state of the cluster
